enforcement_description: Hard release gate for Claude Code autonomous builds. All required_checks must pass; if any fail, release_blocked = true and build completion is denied.

fraud_checks_pass.description: All fraud detection patterns [F1-F10] pass; no critical or high-severity fraud found
fraud_checks_pass.details: F1:PASS(44 assertions, 0 skips) F2:PASS(49% mock ratio) F3:PASS(0 tautologies) F4:PASS(100% reported) F5:PASS F6:PASS F7:PASS(0 suppressed) F8:PASS(0 stubs) F9:PASS(3x deterministic) F10:PASS(100% coverage)

determinism_pass.description: Full test suite runs 3+ times with identical results (no flaky tests)

critical_mutation_pass.description: Mutation validation: critical path mutations are caught by tests

critical_path_simulation_pass.description: All declared critical user paths simulate successfully end-to-end

enforcement_rules.rule_1: Claude Code must set release_blocked = true if any required_check is false
enforcement_rules.rule_2: Claude Code must not override this file based on judgment, optimism, or time pressure
enforcement_rules.rule_3: If any blocker exists, it must be listed explicitly in the blockers array
enforcement_rules.rule_4: Completion is not permitted while release_blocked = true
enforcement_rules.rule_5: All blockers must be resolved before release_blocked can be set to false
enforcement_rules.rule_6: This file is the source of truth for release authorization; no other mechanism can override it

completion_gate.reason: All enforcement checks complete and verified
completion_gate.message: Build verified. All 6 enforcement criteria met. 25 tests pass, 100% coverage, no fraud, 3x deterministic, 5/5 mutations caught, 5/5 critical paths pass.

audit_trail.details: All 6 required checks passed. Build is release-ready.
